summary: LEXA Logo Adaptation & Mega Menu AI Images - All frontend tests PASSED. Logo correctly shows white on homepage dark hero, switches to black (with dark:invert) on scrolled/non-homepage states. All 4 mega menus (Solutions, Services, Intelligence, Packages) display correct AI-generated hero images in Column 4.

tests: Homepage (not scrolled): Logo is WHITE (/lexa-white.png) - VERIFIED
Homepage (scrolled): Logo switches to BLACK (/lexa-black.png) with dark:invert class - VERIFIED
Non-homepage pages: Logo uses BLACK with dark:invert class (verified via code review) - VERIFIED
Dark mode toggle: dark:invert CSS class inverts black logo to white in dark mode - VERIFIED
HTML class shows 'dark' after toggle confirming theme switch

implementation_details.white_logo_condition: Homepage AND not scrolled (dark hero background)
implementation_details.dark_mode_support: CSS class 'dark:invert' automatically inverts black logo in dark mode

dark_mode_toggle.details: Theme toggle button found and working - HTML class changes to include 'dark' when activated

critical_code_review_comments: Logo logic in Header.tsx (line 105): shouldUseDarkText = !isHomepage || isScrolled - correctly determines when to use black vs white logo
SafeImage component at line 153-159 correctly applies conditional src and dark:invert class
All 4 mega menus have AI-generated images in Column 4 (rightmost) as requested
AR-SEO pages at /ar-seo/[slug] and /ar-seo/blog/[slug] have dark:invert class on logo
Note: Cloudflare challenge intermittently appears during testing - retry if needed

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all logo states and mega menu images verified)
